items.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves new SOTA on reasoning benchmarks
items.summary: Scores 83.2% on AIME 2025 math competition, outperforming prior models on reasoning-intensive tasks.

items.title: Scaling laws for multimodal models: new empirical findings
items.summary: Findings suggest efficiency gains plateau earlier than expected when jointly scaling vision and language.

items.title: Constitutional AI v2: improved alignment through iterative refinement
items.summary: Methodology reports a 40% reduction in harmful outputs while retaining benchmark capability.

items.title: Llama 4 Scout & Maverick: natively multimodal from the ground up
items.summary: 17B/400B MoE models trained on 40T tokens with native text-image-video understanding.
items.citation: Dubey, A., Jauhri, A., Pandey, A., et al. — Meta AI (2026). arXiv:2603.01234
items.overview: Meta AI introduces Llama 4 Scout and Llama 4 Maverick as native multimodal open-weight MoE models. Scout targets efficient long-context retrieval, while Maverick targets high-end multilingual reasoning.
keyFindings: Native multimodal pretraining enables unified reasoning across text, image, and video.
Maverick reaches top-tier benchmark parity while remaining self-hostable.
Scout balances strong long-context quality with efficient compute footprint.
Support for 119 languages improves global deployment readiness.

items.title: Long-context recall: how models handle 1M+ token windows
items.summary: Evaluation shows pronounced recall degradation beyond 200K tokens in many systems.

items.title: DeepSeek-R1 open weights: frontier reasoning at minimal cost
items.summary: Full release enables affordable domain-specific reasoning fine-tuning.
